channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ argues Trump could 'bulldoze' Statue of Liberty in White House ballroom hearing
item.description: Three appellate judges heard arguments Friday on whether President Trump's White House ballroom construction should proceed.

item.title: WATCH: How concerned should we be about the 'screwworm?'
item.description: Dr. Ann Hohenhaus, senior veterinarian at Schwarzman Animal Medical Center, discusses the 'new world' screwworm threat.

item.title: Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper arrested on domestic violence charges
item.description: Denver Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper has been arrested on domestic violence charges.

item.title: Man sentenced to life for elaborate double-murder plot to kill his wife
item.description: Brendan Banfield was convicted in the 2023 murders of his wife and a man he allegedly catfished on a fetish website.
